mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trip_members (id, trip_id, user_id, role, status, invited_by, joined_at, created_at, guest_name, is_guest) VALUES (#{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{role}, #{status}, #{invitedBy,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{joinedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, NOW(), #{guestName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isGuest,jdbcType=BOOLEAN})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM trip_members WHERE trip_id = #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY created_at
SELECT * FROM trip_members WHERE trip_id = #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND user_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.update: UPDATE trip_members SET user_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, joined_at = #{joinedAt}, is_guest = #{isGuest,jdbcType=BOOLEAN} WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM trip_members WHERE trip_id = #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND user_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM trip_members WHERE user_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM trip_members WHERE user_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at DESC
